tool.name: GaCDI SRA
tool.description: import sequencing runs from the NCBI Sequence Read Archive

param.name: accessions
param.label: SRA accession(s)
param.help: One or more run accessions (e.g. SRR000001, ERR1234567), separated by commas, spaces or new lines. Each run is fetched with prefetch and converted to gzip-compressed FASTQ.

validator.message: Enter SRA accessions (e.g. SRR000001) separated by commas, spaces or new lines.

tool.help:
**GaCDI — Sequence Read Archive (SRA) importer**
Downloads sequencing runs from the NCBI `SRA <https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/sra>`_ into your Galaxy history as gzip-compressed FASTQ files, using the ``sra-tools`` ``prefetch`` and ``fasterq-dump`` utilities.
Enter one or more run accessions (``SRR``/``ERR``/``DRR`` …) separated by commas, spaces or new lines. Paired-end runs produce ``_1``/``_2`` FASTQ files within the output collection. @HELP_FOOTER@
